allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName PresentationCore; $fs = [IO.File]::OpenRead\('C:\\JosoSchoolSimulator\\picture\\自宅.jpg'\); try { $dec = [Windows.Media.Imaging.BitmapDecoder]::Create\($fs, [Windows.Media.Imaging.BitmapCreateOptions]::None, [Windows.Media.Imaging.BitmapCacheOption]::OnLoad\); $enc = New-Object Windows.Media.Imaging.JpegBitmapEncoder; $enc.QualityLevel = 90; $enc.Frames.Add\([Windows.Media.Imaging.BitmapFrame]::Create\($dec.Frames[0]\)\); $out = [IO.File]::Create\('C:\\JosoSchoolSimulator\\picture\\自宅_conv.jpg'\); $enc.Save\($out\); $out.Close\(\); 'CONVERTED OK' } catch { "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { $fs.Close\(\) })

PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { Write-Output $node.Source } else { Write-Output "no-node" }; $py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { Write-Output $py.Source } else { Write-Output "no-python" })
